Essence of a Vampire  
 

Lore Item No Trade
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Essence of a Vampire
Lore Item No Trade
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:unknown
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 00:02:10
Page Updated:Sun Nov 26th, 2017

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Quests | Recipes | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Plane of Hate
NPC Name
a forsaken revenant - female
a forsaken revenant - male
Coercer T`vala

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Burning Woods
Quest Name
Enchanter Epic: Staff of the Serpent
Used in 1 recipe.
Recipe list - Premium only.

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Hate
Rare drop off revenants in the Plane of Hate used in the Enchanter Epic.


Uploaded May 14th, 2022 by halfridge
Send a correction

ESoV
QuoteReply
# Nov 20 2023 at 11:57 AM Rating: Decent
VirtualMonarch
4 posts
Just updating what has been mentioned by others. I received the drop today off of a forsaken revenant (female) out of one of the houses, she was actually on an upper level so make sure to check upstairs also. I was in the Northern corner where the Coercer T`vala typically spawns. Previous comments I can also confirm this is a very rare drop as I was in PoH for a few days off and on.

# Nov 26 2012 at 8:10 PM Rating: Decent
Wizorb
Guru
117 posts
I just finished my enchanter's epic today and this was the worst part of it by far.

It took me 3 days of camping on/off to get the essence. I got it off a female revenant. I think they're only dropped by enchanter class mobs since the female revenants and the Coercer are both enchanters.
▲ Page top
the rarity of the drop...
QuoteReply
# Nov 25 2012 at 12:57 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1655079476000
109 posts

When it says "very rare" as a drop rate...they mean it!!!
I figured it might drop within 60-80 kills....but it seems that very rare is well beyond my estimate of 60-80 kills. Upon reading previous posts...the only female drop rate seemed kind of bogus to me; I can actually confirm that a female forsaken revenant did drop mine. So the female only drop rate seems accurate, still. Males are a waste of time, but unless you kills all revenants, you'll spawn less females, as a result...therefore increasing the number it might take to actually get your Essence to drop.

I kept track of how many male/female revenats it took to finally get it to drop...a staggering 156 kills...!
That's equates to roughly 3-4 hours of non-stop clearing the entire northern part of the zone, from the Hand of Maestro, north.

Good Luck on getting it to drop.

...and the posts where ppl say they got it within the first few kills....that was PURE LUCK, IMO...the real life drop rate is gonna be MUCH, much longer than that.
▲ Page top
Still drops

# Oct 12 2012 at 8:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344330708
8 posts
It is still a pretty rare drop...

I personally have only seen it drop off a "female" forsaken revenant or Coercer T`Vala...

several hours of killing every revenant that spawned...but it does still drop as of 10/11/12 (unusual date hehe)

Item Info
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2012 at 10:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1615162778311
7 posts
This is supposedly a super rare drop off of a Forsaken Revenant in the Plain of Hate. I was just super lucky and got it on the very first one I killed (not to rub it in to all those who took hours to find it).

Forsaken Revenant are scattered throughout the zone so bring a couple of buddies or a merc and let the killing commence. Best of luck in getting a quick drop.

20 posts
This and popping Felia are the toughest part of this epic.. Days on felia and hours of this essence... Pulled almost the entire zone with mobs on my monk and one finally dropped! yay! (I think it was Male vampire)
▲ Page top
wtf
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2010 at 7:11 PM Rating: Decent
Rickymaru
Scholar
490 posts
You guys must have been hella lucky then. I killed every damn a forsaken revenant i could find on my druids track 3 seperate times. I got sh*t to show for it. Spent literally hours running around killing crap. No exp what so ever cause i had to do it when i got too high in level. Totally sucks. Im not even sure it actually drops. No one kills in hate anymore. Totally screwed on this one im afraid. EDIT: It finally dropped on my 4th clear through. Had one more forsaken revenant to go on my druids tracking list before i had to wait for respawns. To add a bit more info it drop from a female. I started collecting the fine insidious stuff just in case i decided to skip 1.0 and do the 1.5 pre quest. I saw every piece of armor drop though i didn't actually collect any till that 4th time around clearing them out and only saw 2 pieces drop that time. If i had started collecting from the beginning i would have had all of them.



Edited, Oct 22nd 2010 9:49pm by Rickymaru

Dropped today after killing about 20 of the female revenants, sounds easy but for how rare revenants are and then ontop of it you have to find the even rarer female, it took about 4 hours of killing everything around to finally get the lucky one to spawn.

Female or male?
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2008 at 8:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1710116181020
Scholar
116 posts
Was trying to figure out if it only dropped off females or not...and by my luck it dropped off of a female. *shrug*

Only took about an hour of uber-plowing, don't know if I was just lucky though.

EDIT: After camping mini nameds in Hate for three days (3 hours ish at a time) but not specifically plowing, the essence dropped for me again and once again was a female. BE WARNED, some vamps have 7 min rot time and some have 27 minute rot time--it's best to just have the enchanter with you.

3rd essence, was in Hate for about 15 minutes and dropped again off another female. Right now I'm pretty sure it's female only.

Edited, Aug 5th 2009 1:25pm by AudacityoftheFeralkin

Edited, Aug 6th 2009 1:44pm by AudacityoftheFeralkin

__DEL__1641773888680

64 posts
my guild and i were in PoHate a total of 7 hours....killed countless forsaken revenants and all we got was vampire dust and some runes....is there a certain area that this things drop in, or am i correct to say that it is an ULTRA rare drop from any of them? even at ultra rare, ya think we would have seen one in a 7 hour period....any info is helpful

i was farming for the seoc today at the "an eerie chest" site, and one of these dropped off a revenant. # Oct 10 2005 at 11:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592267279119
Scholar
39 posts
Just be fore warned that the Rot timer on the Essence of a Vampire is 7 mins, my husband got kicked from the game by the all to famous EQClient Crash and had to wait almost 5 mins to get back in and there wasn't enough time to zone back to save his rotting drop. Did I mention we spent 8 hours in PoHate for this one drop to have it rot because of circumstances that were out of our control... really sux

Good luck to the rest of ya!

ok went up there 2 nights ago with me 60 Enc and on other comp duoing in a 67 druid pulled with my enc slow tanked it dru has 3 right clicky dots she healed me also but was up in hate no longer than 30 mins than one dropped only had to kill 2 reverants ... maybe i got lucky but oh well .. killed reverent to the right of the zone in fought way over the steps turned left at bottom of the steps the reverent infront of me i pulled with slow was a male reverent that dropped the essance ... bout 2 hours later guild popped into fear and dropped the wraith .... EPIC DONE

▲ Page top
Where did the Essence drop?
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2005 at 6:05 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593361220308
Scholar
70 posts
I think I see a pattern developing. In every case where someone has reported an extremely HIGH drop rate or fast drop, they've been in a position to kill the place holders for Magi P'Tasa or Coercer T'Vala.

SasjaS reported three "Essence of Vampire" dropping in a short time while pulling the house just south of the bridge. That's where Magi P'Tasa spawns. megodude reported a drop just over the bridge from the zone in. Athdare reported a drop while hunting at the zone in. All of those could have been the spawn point for P'Tasa.

Somewhere I saw a report of multiple drops while hunting in the northwest corner of the zone. They were clearing the spawn point for Coercer T'Vala. zanatoz says his was next door to Coercer T'Vala, but it's easy to be off by that much. Estariel reported hers came from that place holder.

On the other hand, those who report killing hordes of revenants rarely specify which ones they killed. One did say they'd killed Coercer T'Vala a lot, but never mentioned the place holder.

This suggests a much higher drop rate from "A Forsaken Revenant" when it is a place holder. We know one revenant looks and smells like another, but those two are on a completely separate spawn cycle, so they may be on a separate loot table too.

I've been trying to help an enchanter with this drop and having no luck at all. He's as frustrated as many of the chanters posting here. After another fruitless night of Hate, I came back and reread the posts here and compared them to the maps. That's when I noticed a correspondence between where people kill and how often the Essence drops.

Tonight I plan to go back and focus on those two spots. If this works, the important thing isn't how MANY you kill or how LONG you spend there killing, but WHERE you find them.

Edited, Fri Feb 4 18:27:20 2005
▲ Page top

# Apr 08 2004 at 8:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776082168

I went to Hate today and got the drop from a female revenant just over the bridge near zone in.

Took just under an hour all up, we basically pulled all we could reach before repops and killed them.

So either the drop has been increased considerably or I got plain lucky. Maybe killed 10 - 15 revenants in that time.
